song.title: Joy
song.lyrics: [V1] We're choosing celebration Breaking into freedom You're the song You're the song of our hearts We cast aside our shadows Trust You with our sorrows You're the song You're the song of our hearts [P] We're dancing to the rhythm of Your heart We're rising from the ashes to the stars [C] You're the joy, joy, joy lighting my soul The joy, joy, joy making me whole Though I'm broken I am running into your arms of love Whoa, whoah, whoa, whoa. Hey! Whoa, whoa [V2] The pain will not define us Joy will reignite us You're the song You're the song of our hearts The dark is just a canvas For Your grace and brithness You're the song You're ths song of our hearts [B1] Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa. Hey! [B2] In the shadows, in the sorrows In the desert, when the pain hits You are constant, ever-present You're the songs of my heart [B3] I've got the joy, joy, joy, joy down in my heart Down in my heart, down in my heart I've got the joy, joy, joy, joy down in my heart Down in my heart to stay
song.author: Rend Collective
